series_metadata.series_description: This series contains records generally associated with the certification of blasters under the Division''s blaster certification program, and includes, but is not limited to: applications for certification and re-certification (three year renewals), examination results, evaluation criteria, fee assessments/collections, certifications, and historical information on blaster compliance and continuing education.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Paper records to be retained until five years after expiration, revocation, or voluntary resignation of certificate, and then shredded. If scanned and saved in an electronic format, the paper copy may be destroyed. ; Electronic: Electronic records are retained until five years after expiration, revocation, or voluntary resignation of certificate, then deleted., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
